name: Office Macro Spawning Suspicious Process
description: Detects Microsoft Office applications spawning suspicious child processes via macros
query:
// Detect Office applications spawning scripting engines
// Indicates macro-based malware execution
events from edr_process
where parent_exe matches "(?i)(winword|excel|powerpnt|msaccess|outlook)\.exe$"
  and exe_path matches "(?i)(cmd\.exe|powershell|wscript|cscript|mshta|certutil|rundll32)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 30 seconds
